steps.title: Identify the linear form and constant term
steps.content: The function modeling the price is linear, written as $$F(x) = mx + 2.74$$. The number 2.74 is the constant term, i.e., the y‑intercept.

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 0 to find the initial price
steps.content: At September 1, 2014, the time elapsed is $$x = 0$$ months. Substituting gives $$F(0) = m·0 + 2.74 = 2.74$$. Thus 2.74 represents the average price per gallon on that date. That matches choice C — C is correct.
